subject: Intermediary device for data message network routing and enhancement in a contact center environment (US 11,431,847 B2)

dialog.body: Intermediary device disposed in the data communication path of a contact center between an electronic communications network and end-user and agent computing devices, enhancing and routing data messages across the path.

meta.notes: Priority 2016-02-04, filed 2019-10-02, granted and published 2022-08-30. Assignee: Virtual Hold Technology Solutions, LLC. Earlier 2016 priority date distinguishes this filing from the US 9,762,734 / US 11,146,517 continuation chain (which share a 2017-01-20 priority).
